title: NYC just had its best tech quarter since 2021 #nyctech #startup
spoken_script:
# NYC VC Boom Script (45 seconds)

New York City just hit four point two billion dollars in venture capital funding in Q1. And honestly? This isn't a fluke.

Here's what's actually happening. The money is flowing to companies that need three things at the same time: Wall Street relationships, real media access, and fashion industry connections. You literally cannot build those from a garage in Silicon Valley.

Cornell Tech just graduated its biggest class ever from Roosevelt Island. And most of them? They're staying in New York.

The ecosystem is finally working. Finance, media, AI all spinning together.

Want the full breakdown? Head to nyspotlightreport.com.
